He adds this could support a more favorable inflation outlook ahead, but warns t
@DeItaone: YIELD ON 10-YR U.S. TREASURY NOTES EDGES UP AFTER CPI DATA, LAST UP 0.8 BASIS POINTS AT 4.536%
@unusual_whales: BREAKING: US CPI Yoy actual: 4.2% (forecast: 4.2%, previous: 3.8%)
@DeItaone: US SHORT-TERM INTEREST-RATE FUTURES RISE AFTER INFLATION REPORT, AS TRADERS PARE FED RATE HIKE BETS

@KobeissiLetter: BREAKING: May CPI inflation rises to 4.2%, the highest level since April 2023. Core CPI inflation also rises to 2.9%, the highest since September 2025. Inflation in the US is officially back above 4% and more than double the Fed's target. Odds of Fed rate hikes are rising.
